hero.title: Banking, reimagined for the modern world.
hero.subtitle: RetBankX gives you real-time insights, instant transfers, and enterprise-grade security — all in one intuitive dashboard.

features.title: Everything you need to manage your money.
features.subtitle: Real-time visibility, intelligent categorization, and instant transfers across all your accounts.

realtime.name: Real-time dashboard
realtime.desc: View all your accounts, balances, and net worth in a single, unified interface that updates instantly.

insights.name: Smart transaction insights
insights.desc: Automatically categorized transactions with powerful filtering and sorting to track your spending patterns.

transfers.name: Instant fund transfers
transfers.desc: Move money between your accounts in real time with our streamlined transfer interface and built-in validation.

security.name: Bank-grade security
security.desc: AES-256 encryption, multi-factor authentication, and continuous monitoring keep your data and funds safe.

global.name: Global accessibility
global.desc: Full bilingual support (English / Français) with locale-aware formatting for dates and currencies.

audit.name: Detailed audit trails
audit.desc: Every transfer is logged with full traceability, giving you complete visibility into account activity.

security.title: Built on a foundation of trust.
security.subtitle: RetBankX uses the same security infrastructure trusted by the world's largest financial institutions.

encryption.label: AES-256 Encryption
encryption.desc: All data encrypted at rest and in transit

cta.title: Ready to take control of your finances?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who trust RetBankX for their banking needs.

footer.legal: RetBankX is a financial technology company, not a bank. Banking services provided by partner banks, FDIC insured up to $250,000. © {{year}} RetBankX, Inc. All rights reserved.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.
login.demoWarning: Demo mode — sign up for a new account or use any previously created account.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start managing your finances in minutes.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Your complete financial overview at a glance.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.description: View and filter all transactions across your accounts.

empty.title: No transactions
empty.desc: No transactions match the current filter.

transfer.title: Transfer Funds
transfer.description: Move funds between your accounts instantly.

success.text: Your funds have been transferred successfully.

error.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: View and manage all your banking accounts in one place.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: In-depth analysis of your spending, income, and financial trends.

investments.title: Investments
investments.description: Track your investment portfolio performance and holdings.

cards.title: Cards
cards.description: Manage your debit and credit cards securely.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile, preferences, and security settings.
settings.languageDesc: Choose your preferred language for the interface
settings.currencyDesc: All monetary values are displayed in USD
settings.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account
settings.sessionsDesc: You are logged in on this device
settings.closeAccountDesc: Permanently close your account and remove all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

layout.title: RetBankX — Retail Banking Dashboard
layout.description: Manage your accounts, transactions, and transfers.

home.title: RetBankX — Modern Banking
